input.subject: Looking for UK counsel for a £40m carve-out
input.body: Hi — we're a private equity sponsor looking at a UK carve-out (industrial cleaning, ~£40m EV). Looking for English-law counsel to lead the SPA, TUPE, and competition filings. Could you confirm capacity and a partner-level contact for a kick-off this week? We'd want signing in 6–8 weeks.
